Package org.javalabs.jpa.query

Class SBPoolImpl

java.lang.Object
org.javalabs.jpa.query.SBPoolImpl

public class SBPoolImpl extends Object implements SBPool
Implementation of SBPool.

Sudiptasish Chanda

  • Method Details

    • getInstance

      public static SBPool getInstance()

    • getInstance

      public static SBPool getInstance(int poolSize)

    • lookup

      public QueryBuffer lookup()
      Description copied from interface: SBPool
      Lookup the pool to obtain an unused QueryBuffer. If the pool has no available QueryBuffer, then a new QueryBuffer object will be created and returned.
      Specified by:
      lookup in interface SBPool
      Returns:
      QueryBuffer

    • release

      public void release(QueryBuffer buff)
      Description copied from interface: SBPool
      Release this QueryBuffer to the pool. This API will clear the internal content of the QueryBuffer before releasing it to a pool.
      Specified by:
      release in interface SBPool
      Parameters:
      buff - QueryBuffer to be released.
